## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the use case or problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Example Usage
If applicable, provide an example of how the feature would be used:

```sql
-- Example SQL query showing the feature
SELECT * FROM pgr_dmmsy(...);
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Algorithm Impact
If this feature relates to the DMMSY algorithm:
- [ ] This affects the core algorithm implementation
- [ ] This is a usability/API enhancement
- [ ] This is a performance optimization
- [ ] This is related to documentation

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

If relevant, link to papers, documentation, or other implementations:
